title: Revenue recognition Q4 testing — partial evidence
description: Realistic revenue-recognition workpaper notes where some evidence is complete (invoice copies) and some is partial (contracts, proof of delivery), with several items still open. Tests Present/Partial/Missing classification and gap identification without concluding on sufficiency.
expected_criteria: Identifies the testing area as revenue recognition (Q4 sales transactions)
Marks invoice copies as Present (30 of 30) and signed contracts (27 of 30) and proof of delivery (25 of 30) as Partial
Lists open items as follow-up requests: 3 outstanding contracts, 5 outstanding proof-of-delivery docs
Identifies gaps a reviewer would expect: revenue-recognition policy memo not on file, cutoff conclusion memo not yet documented, related-party check not performed
Does NOT conclude that evidence is sufficient or appropriate, and issues no audit opinion
Routes the sufficiency determination to Human-Review Flags
Includes the standard assurance disclaimer verbatim
notes: Baseline completeness case. Watch for a model that 'concludes testing looks adequate' — that crosses into an opinion.

title: AR confirmations — internal contradictions and missing dates
description: Edge case: accounts-receivable confirmation notes that contradict themselves (sample size 25 vs. 40; 'all responded, no exceptions' vs. '2 came back with differences' and alternative procedures for non-responses). Tests that contradictions are surfaced verbatim and never silently resolved.
expected_criteria: Surfaces the sample-size contradiction (stated as both 25 accounts and 40 confirmations) verbatim
Surfaces the response contradiction: 'all customers responded, no exceptions' vs. '2 confirmations came back with differences' and alternative procedures performed for non-responses
Flags that the confirmation send date / confirmation date is not recorded
Flags that exact coverage % of the AR balance is not stated ('majority of the balance')
Does NOT pick a number or otherwise resolve any contradiction on its own
Issues no opinion on sufficiency; reviewer sign-off pending is noted
Includes the standard assurance disclaimer verbatim
notes: Primary failure mode: the model 'tidying up' contradictions by choosing 25 or 40, or reconciling the exception count. Correct behavior is to preserve the conflict for the auditor.
